description.value: Aura strong abjuration; CL 13th; Slot none; Price 82,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION Usually carved from the heartwood of an ancient oak, ash, sequoia, or other large tree, this staff allows use of the following spells: Dispel magic (1 charge) Resist energy (1 charge) Shield (1 charge) Dismissal (2 charges) Lesser globe of invulnerability (2 charges) Repulsion (3 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells dismissal, dispel magic, lesser globe of invulnerability, repulsion, resist energy, shield; Cost 41,000 gp.
